description: Executive application overview correlating metrics (Mimir), logs (Loki), traces (Tempo), and profiles (Pyroscope). The primary entry point for service health assessment.

panels.description: Total inbound request rate across all endpoints for the selected application.
panels.title: Request Rate

panels.description: Percentage of requests returning 5xx status codes. Thresholds: <1% green, <5% yellow, >=5% red.
panels.title: Error Rate %

panels.description: Median (50th percentile) request latency. Green <=100ms, yellow <=300ms, red >300ms.
panels.title: P50 Latency

panels.description: 95th percentile request latency. Green <=300ms, yellow <=1s, red >1s.
panels.title: P95 Latency

panels.description: 99th percentile request latency. Green <=500ms, yellow <=2s, red >2s.
panels.title: P99 Latency

panels.description: Application Performance Index. >0.9 = satisfied, 0.7-0.9 = tolerating, <0.7 = frustrated.
panels.title: Apdex Score

panels.description: Request rate broken down by service over time.
panels.title: Request Rate Over Time

panels.description: Error rate percentage by service over time. Red threshold line at 1%.
panels.title: Error Rate % Over Time

panels.description: Latency percentiles (P50, P95, P99) over time for request duration.
panels.title: Latency Percentiles

panels.description: Multi-window error budget burn rate. Sustainable=1x, Warning=2x, Critical=10x. Higher values indicate faster SLO budget consumption.
panels.title: SLO Error Budget Burn Rate

panels.description: Rolling availability SLI calculated over 5-minute windows. SLO target line at 99.9%.
panels.title: Availability SLI (30d Rolling)

panels.description: Log volume grouped by severity level. Spikes in error/fatal logs often correlate with metric anomalies.
panels.title: Log Volume by Severity

panels.description: Live error log stream. Click any log line to see full details and trace correlation.
panels.title: Error Logs — Live Stream

panels.description: Trace-derived error rate from span metrics. Complementary to HTTP error rate -- captures internal service failures visible only in traces.
panels.title: Trace Error Rate

panels.description: P95 span duration broken down by operation name from Tempo span metrics.
panels.title: Span Duration P95 by Operation

panels.description: CPU usage by pod in the selected namespace. Useful for identifying hot pods or resource contention.
panels.title: CPU Usage by Pod

panels.description: Working set memory by pod. Sustained high usage may indicate memory leaks -- correlate with CPU profiles in Pyroscope.
panels.title: Memory Usage by Pod

panels.description: Pod restart rate. Frequent restarts indicate CrashLoopBackOff or OOMKill events -- check logs for root cause.
panels.title: Pod Restart Rate

panels.description: Navigate to the deep-dive log analysis dashboard filtered by the current application and namespace.
panels.title: Deep Dive Logs

panels.description: Navigate to the Tempo trace analysis dashboard for distributed tracing deep dives.
panels.title: Trace Analysis

panels.description: Navigate to the Pyroscope continuous profiling dashboard for CPU and memory flame graphs.
panels.title: CPU Profiles

panels.description: Navigate to the infrastructure dashboard for node, cluster, and networking metrics.
panels.title: Infrastructure

title: Application Overview — Four Signal Correlation
